signals.npcLine: Market shadows deepen, trust erodes with every silent dip.
signals.questPulse: Scan for ghost trades slipping beneath the fear veil.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto nodes flicker weak; pulse weakens, panic in the grid.
signals.clueEvent: Sudden silence in major token chatter; a storm brews.

signals.npcLine: Watch the undercurrents—minor tokens stir, unknown gains lurk.
signals.questPulse: Track emerging spikes on off-world assets; anomalies detected.
signals.worldFeed: Data leaks show strange activity in fringe markets tonight.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable token pulses hint at dark market manipulation.

signals.npcLine: Crypto dread thickens; low sentiment breeds opportunists.
signals.questPulse: Hunt whispered rumors of protocol exploits before next collapse.
signals.worldFeed: Decayed sentiment scores signal deep-rooted market rot now.
signals.clueEvent: Signal drops: traders vanish, fear masks true intentions.

signals.npcLine: Scout forgotten coin caches; dead zones might yield power-ups.
signals.questPulse: Investigate stagnant tokens with hidden potential beneath the noise.
signals.worldFeed: Obscure assets flicker—shadow profits await the daring few.
signals.clueEvent: Whispers of unrevealed vaults surface in darknet chatter.

signals.npcLine: Silent nodes relay chatter: 'Asteroid' and 'Chip' pulse with mystery.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt cryptic broadcasts around trending yet unstable chains.
signals.worldFeed: Energy spikes from enigmatic coins disrupt grid stability.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented token signals draw shadows into the neon night.
